title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Select Trust

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Select Trust
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Select Trust, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
